# terrible_dellemc_powerflex_sds (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `state` (String) State of the SDS.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fault_set_id` (String) Unique identifier of the fault set. Mutually exclusive with *fault_set_name*.
- `fault_set_name` (String) Name of the fault set. Mutually exclusive with *fault_set_id*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `performance_profile` (String) Performance profile to apply to the SDS. The HighPerformance profile configures a predefined set of parameters for very high performance use cases. Default value by API is `HighPerformance`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `protection_domain_id` (String) The ID of the protection domain. Mutually exclusive with *protection_domain_name*.
- `protection_domain_name` (String) The name of the protection domain. Mutually exclusive with *protection_domain_id*.
- `rfcache_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to enable the Read Flash cache.
- `rmcache_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to enable the Read RAM cache.
- `rmcache_size` (Number) Read RAM cache size (in MB). Minimum size is 128 MB. Maximum size is 3911 MB.
- `sds_id` (String) The ID of the SDS. Except create operation, all other operations can be performed using *sds_id*. Mutually exclusive with *sds_name*.
- `sds_ip_list` (String) Dictionary of IPs and their roles for the SDS. At least one IP-role is mandatory while creating a SDS. IP-roles can be updated as well.
- `sds_ip_state` (String) State of IP with respect to the SDS.
- `sds_name` (String) The name of the SDS. Mandatory for create operation. It is unique across the PowerFlex array. Mutually exclusive with *sds_id*.
- `sds_new_name` (String) SDS new name.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `sds_details` (String) Details of the SDS.
